requiredSecrets.name: POINTER_CF_API_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.instructions: Create a read-only Cloudflare API token for Pointer live hopper111.com audits, then paste the token value here for standing local FIR access.

requiredSecrets.name: POINTER_CF_WRITE_API_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.instructions: Create a write-capable Cloudflare API token for hopper111.com zone settings fixes. Give it Zone Settings: Edit scoped to the hopper111.com zone, then paste the token value here for standing local FIR remediation access.

requiredSecrets.name: CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID
requiredSecrets.instructions: Store the Hopper live Cloudflare Access client id so ScreenGenie and Voltmeter can authenticate the protected Hopper and worker surfaces without pausing.

requiredSecrets.name: CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_SECRET
requiredSecrets.instructions: Store the Hopper live Cloudflare Access client secret so ScreenGenie and Voltmeter can authenticate the protected Hopper and worker surfaces without pausing.

journeys.title: Create a contact shell and verify the live save chain

steps.label: Open the Contacts surface and enter create mode
Fill the new contact shell fields with test data
Submit the Save Contact Shell action
Reload the Contacts surface and reselect the saved contact

ui: The create panel opens without layout collapse.
The new contact appears in the contacts list after save.
The saved contact detail pane matches the submitted values.
runtime: The save request resolves through the live Linux-backed Lucy runtime path.
No helper or shell error banner remains after save.
persistence: A new row exists in accounts for the test contact.
Linked account_platforms rows exist only for the platforms created during the test.

actions: Delete the test contact from the canonical API or persistence path.
Delete any linked account_platforms rows created for the test contact.
Clear any helper or local shell test residue created during the run.
verify: The test contact no longer appears in the contacts list.
No test rows remain in accounts or account_platforms for the generated test key.

journeys.title: Edit an existing contact and verify the update path

steps.label: Open the Contacts surface and select a seeded editable contact
Update editable fields in the selected contact shell
Reload the surface and confirm the edited values persist

ui: The detail pane remains visually stable through edit mode and save.
The edited values reappear after reload.
runtime: The update request reaches the intended live runtime path.
persistence: The matching accounts row reflects the edited values after save.

actions: Restore the seeded contact values changed during the test.
verify: The seeded contact is back at its canonical baseline values.

journeys.title: Bind the Reddit shell and verify helper-side continuity

steps.label: Open the Contacts surface and select a bind-ready Reddit contact
Open the helper or bind controls for the Reddit portal
Run the bind or resume helper action
Refresh helper state on the selected contact

ui: The helper action row remains aligned and readable through the bind flow.
The selected portal status updates without detached actions or collapsed helper copy.
runtime: The helper action reaches the Linux Lucy runtime and returns a valid status update.
No helper continuity error remains after refresh.
persistence: The platform row for the selected contact reflects the latest bind status.

actions: Restore the selected bind-ready contact to its baseline helper state if the run changes it.
verify: The test contact is left in a known baseline state for the next run.

pointer.command: cd '/Users/dannybrooking/Documents/GitHub = master copy/Pointer' && node src/cli.mjs --profile profiles/hopper111-boundary.json --mode verified

commands: cd '/Users/dannybrooking/Documents/GitHub = master copy/ScreenGenie' && export $(grep -E '^(CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID|CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_SECRET)=' '/Users/dannybrooking/Documents/GitHub = master copy/Voltmeter/.env.local' | xargs) && npm run genie -- --app hopper111 --flow home-rich --cf-access-client-id "$CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID" --cf-access-client-secret "$CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_SECRET"
